title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.1263 - Background checks required, when
text:
210.1263.  Background checks required, when. — Officers, managers, contractors, volunteers with access to children, employees, and other support staff of residential care facilities subject to the notification requirements under sections 210.1250 to 210.1286; any person eighteen years of age or older who resides at or on the property of such residential care facility; any person who has unsupervised contact with a resident of such residential care facility; and owners of such residential care facilities who will have access to the facilities shall undergo background checks under section 210.493.
(L. 2021 H.B. 557 & 560) 
Effective 7-14-21
